description_long: This rifle features a distinctive design with a predominantly black metallic body and two prominent cylindrical attachments at either end, one yellow and one gray. The main receiver is robust and angular, with visible mounting rails and a skeletal trigger guard. The yellow cylindrical component at the muzzle end appears to be a specialized attachment, possibly for training or non-lethal use, while the gray component at the stock end is similarly shaped and may serve as a counterweight or buffer. The rifle includes a pistol grip and a short, compact stock, with visible screws and mechanical details along the frame. The overall construction suggests a modern, possibly custom or modified firearm intended for specialized urban applications.
description: A modern black rifle with yellow and gray cylindrical attachments at either end, featuring a compact stock and detailed mechanical frame. The design is robust and specialized, likely for unique urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow cylindrical muzzle attachment and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the rifle, the yellow muzzle device, gray stock attachment, and detailed frame.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the gray cylindrical stock attachment and the alignment of the rifle's body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the mounting rails and attachments.
